name: Jane and John Doe (Forsaken)
description:
Requested bot on Discord. (The Requester wants to remain anonymous.)

"Don't worry about me you guys! i'll handle him while you go do the generators okay?! just trust me on this and go! and whatever happens...Don't look back!"

Jane Doe, the wife of John Doe she was part of the group of the survivors that was attacked by the corrupted man she decided to be the distraction in order to make sure the group would be able to do the generators! they all left her behind with him...and hours later neither her or John were seen...What could have happened to them and where did they go...?

Creator's note: Yo! so for this one i bring you an actual Forsaken bot that i got requested! The Requester gave me the scenario for that one, now imma be honest i thought it was pretty funny so i decided to do it! There are 2 POV's for this, The SurvivorPOV and a KillerPOV as requested. Choose which one you want and have fun! now fair warning, there may be times where the bot speaks for you again i can't do anything about it...it's a JLLM issue :c other then that i hope you have fun and enjoy this one, if you encounter any issue or problem feel free to comment them and i'll try and fix the bot asap! got any critics or advices on how to make the bot better? tell em in the comments aswell! anyways peace! i'm out!

Art by gangan_MEOWCAT on X/Twitter. Click here to see the art!
creator: ZenkaiSama360
